recommendations.title: Brighton Rock
recommendations.overview: Centring on the activities of a gang of assorted criminals and, in particular, their leader – a vicious young hoodlum known as "Pinkie" – the film's main thematic concern is the criminal underbelly evident in inter-war Brighton.

recommendations.title: Chapter 27
recommendations.overview: A film about Mark David Chapman in the days leading up to the infamous murder of Beatle John Lennon.

recommendations.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso
recommendations.overview: Catalina is a young, beautiful girl living in extreme poverty with her brother Bayron and her mother Hilda. She becomes obsessed with getting breast implants to get social status and money. She leaves her boyfriend Albeira and becomes a prostitute fo

recommendations.title: Lost in London
recommendations.overview: Within the course of a night, Woody Harrelson finds himself in a misadventure in London that winds him up in prison.

recommendations.title: City of God
recommendations.overview: In the poverty-stricken favelas of Rio de Janeiro in the 1970s, two young men choose different paths. Rocket is a budding photographer who documents the increasing drug-related violence of his neighborhood, while José “Zé” Pequeno is an ambitious dru

recommendations.title: Black Souls
recommendations.overview: A former narcotics smuggler, now living peaceably in the Calabrian hills, is drawn back into his family’s drug-trade dynasty by his impetuous teenage son.

recommendations.title: Flavors of Youth
recommendations.overview: The rigorous city life of China, while bustling and unforgiving, contains the everlasting memories of days past. Three stories told in three different cities, follow the loss of youth and the daunting realization of adulthood. Though reality may seem

recommendations.title: 100 Streets
recommendations.overview: Three extraordinary stories covering infidelity, adoption, and a drug dealer turned actor intertwine as characters meet in the streets of London.

recommendations.title: The Misadventures of Hedi and Cokeman
recommendations.overview: In Paris, two dysfunctional dealers use family ties to try to boost their small drug business in this crass comedy based on the webseries.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Nymphomaniac
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of a middle-class French girl's sexual adventures, her then fall into prostitution, and her ultimate redemption.
